pi_items.source: Verified in task.json and confirmed correct path format. setup_task.sh creates /home/ga/Documents directory.
Verified in task.json. setup_task.sh creates /home/ga/Documents directory with permissions.
Verified against Natural Earth dataset. The continent field uses value 'Europe' for European countries. Agent downloaded and analyzed ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp confirming this value is used.
Verified in setup_geoserver.sh which publishes the ne_countries PostGIS table as a layer in the 'ne' workspace. GeoServer notation 'ne:ne_countries' is correct.
Found via web search and verified by agent's download. Natural Earth official source for 110m countries data.
Agent downloaded and analyzed the actual Natural Earth 110m shapefile. Filtered data where CONTINENT='Europe' yields 39 features.
Agent verified via geopandas analysis of actual shapefile. Field is uppercase 'CONTINENT', not 'continent'.
Agent's geopandas analysis of ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp shows 177 total features (sovereign entities and countries).
Agent's geopandas analysis confirmed CRS is EPSG:4326. Also documented in setup_geoserver.sh with -a_srs EPSG:4326.

pi_items.verified_value: Real, publicly available geospatial data from Natural Earth
pi_items.source: Natural Earth is an official, peer-reviewed geographic dataset created from public sources (UN, CIA, etc). Downloaded from naturalearthdata.com.

privileged_info_summary: The task queries real Natural Earth 1:110m countries data. The dataset contains 177 sovereign entities total, with 39 countries classified in the Europe continent (field name: CONTINENT, uppercase). The layer 'ne:ne_countries' is published in GeoServer's 'ne' workspace with WGS84 projection (EPSG:4326). Metadata claims for paths (/home/ga/Documents/europe_countries.geojson and /home/ga/Documents/europe_report.txt) are correctly specified. The CQL filter continent='Europe' will return exactly 39 country features from the 110m scale dataset.
